calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk: Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Derick Hill, is present.
Attorney, Karen Y Uchiyama, appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Traci Evans, is present.
Attorney, Peter Hadians, representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 163 Charter Oak Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94124. The trial date of November 3, 2008 is vacated.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Advanced From Oct-20-08 To Oct-08-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEFENDANT TO FILE A RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT WITHIN 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
